notes: Played all the scenes and ran into no issues.
title: Maximum Action

notes:
The game runs smoothly being a Unity game; however it suffers the common 'Mouse Drift' issue which makes the game unplayable since its a fast paced action shooter. At the time of posting there is no known fix. 
Also the previous report says disable D3d11 however this will result in a crash on launch as the game requires d11 to run.
title: Maximum Action

gpu: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060 with Max-Q Design
notes: The only real problem is that the game won't close without me force quitting it via the terminal. There's a few bugs and minor lag but that seems to be on Windows too based on the reviews of this game
title: MAXIMUM Action

notes: Runs perfectly right out the gate, except you have to close the game using the task manager.
title: MAXIMUM Action

notes:
fully playable in fullscreen without any problem
you have to force quit it with alt+f3 if you want this game to quit.
windowed mode does not work.
